description: collections_search — FamilySearch collections for Kentucky/Muhlenberg. Certificates begin 1911; county death registers 1852-1910 are gappy; probate is deep for the 1870s.

results.title: Kentucky Deaths, 1911-1967
results.notes: Statewide death certificates — registration began 1 January 1911; no statewide certificates exist for earlier deaths.

results.title: Kentucky, Deaths and Burials, 1843-1970
results.notes: Index of county-level death registers (1852-1910 era coverage is partial — many counties have gaps for the 1860s-1870s) and later certificates.

results.title: Kentucky Probate Records, 1727-1990
results.notes: County court probate — wills, administrator bonds, estate settlements, inventories. Browse-only images organized by county and volume; deep coverage for the 1870s including Muhlenberg County.
